rationale: This candidate provides the most natural and technically accurate translation. It correctly translates 'pager' as 'la guardia' (being on call), whereas other versions used 'buscador de emergencias' (emergency searcher/pager device), which misses the professional context. It also handles technical terms like 'chunks', 'embeddings', and 'greedy decoding' with appropriate Spanish equivalents or common industry terms. It preserves all MDX structures and heading levels perfectly.
